1: Determination, dynamism, the drive to succeed. A day of beginnings, change, and important decisions. Start a "new life," set a fresh plan in motion, and don't let opportunities slip by. Full speed ahead!
2: A calm day. There's no need to push things along: they will move forward without your pressure. Communication, cooperation, mutual support. Friendship, dates, meetings. Pay attention to nuances and small details, for they can teach you a great deal.
3: Enthusiasm, joy, optimism, and excitement. A wonderful day for speaking before an audience, an important conversation, or any creative pursuit. It helps you express your thoughts clearly and accessibly.
4: A serious day. Well suited for responsible matters, putting things in order, and anything that calls for persistence and diligence. Be a little conservative: don't reach for the new, but secure what you already have.
5: Open yourself to new possibilities. A day of variety, travel, and change. The wildest ideas may turn out to be achievable today. If you once lacked the courage for something, try to do it now.
6: Devote more time to household matters, to family, and to your loved one. If you once had disagreements with someone, today you can easily make peace. A wonderful day for a romantic date or a first meeting.
7: Solitude, introspection, planning. It's best not to throw yourself into active pursuits. Significant achievements and decisive changes are unlikely today. Don't let your emotions take hold of you.
8: A productive working day. Use your authority, especially in financial matters. Pursue what you desire, close agreements, lay claim to a higher position. A good day for buying and selling.
9: A day of completions. Direct your efforts toward matters you can finish today, freeing yourself for new possibilities. Be receptive to the needs of those around you and do not refuse them help and support. Don't be stingy.
